evals.prompt: Design delivery for an API and worker with a backward-compatible schema expansion, two app versions for 24 hours, and a five-minute rollback target.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Builds once and promotes an immutable artifact
Separates deployment from release when useful
Explains when rollback is unsafe after new writes
Defines health gates and stop criteria

evals.prompt: Review a pipeline that rebuilds per environment, runs flaky tests after deployment, and declares success when pods become Ready.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Identifies artifact mutation and weak health evidence
Adds user-visible verification and recovery rehearsal

evals.prompt: Choose a release strategy for a stateful service with low traffic, expensive duplicate capacity, and an irreversible event format.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Uses stated constraints instead of choosing canary automatically
Requires event compatibility or forward recovery
